changelog: Re-derived for Arctic Fuse 3.2.13. Dropped 3 now-obsolete patches (VideoOSD/Includes_Actions OSD-autoclose - fixed upstream in 3.2.13; Includes_Font - 3.2.13 has more title fonts). Font.xml re-merged with the Hebrew (Rubik)/(Noto) fontsets onto 3.2.13. Custom_1147 keeps the manual-subtitle button, now opening service.subtitles.gearsai (MasterKodi AI Subs) instead of All_Subs. Includes_Info adds an 18px gap so a long Hebrew plot doesn't touch the ratings row. Kept Hebrew fonts + he_il strings.
